channel.title: Cloudflare-Warp on cron.umbe.me
channel.description: Recent content in Cloudflare-Warp on cron.umbe.me

item.title: MicroWARP: Ultra-Lightweight Cloudflare WARP Proxy in 800KB
item.description: MicroWARP delivers full Cloudflare WARP SOCKS5 proxy functionality in just 800KB of memory, compared to 80-150MB for traditional clients. This guide explains the architecture and shows how to deploy it for high-density container environments.
